title: Team-wide provider allowlist on AI Gateway
summary: Team-wide provider allowlist on AI Gateway
whyItMatters: AI Gateway now supports a team-wide provider allowlist. Teams can restrict which providers can serve requests, so traffic only routes to approved providers. The allowlist applies to every request through AI Gateway, including Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) traffic. Regulated teams typically vet AI providers across multiple dimensions with security and legal sign…
